meaning: n.(光、热等的)散发,发射,喷射
examples: The emission of gases such as carbon dioxide should be stabilized at their present level.
It is clear that the U.S. will meet its emission goals.
Emission of these "greenhouse" gases contributes to global warming.
California has led the country in enacting stricter air pollution and tailpipe emission standards.
Among the questions are: can the Environmental Protection Agency regulate the emission of greenhouse gases?
